title: Re-order the item

posts.author: JayHayashi (Jay Lim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there anyway to re-order the items display on time card?
I would like to arrange it in such that it will be view according to the series of number?

Now my time card item [5.1] Start & End is displayed near the bottom of the card but I need it to be shown as the 1st item on the card.

I had re-ordered the column in my boards but I am still unable to get this sort out.

image914×1264 57.1 KB

posts.author: askstratman (Angela Stratman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone found a solution for this?
I have the same issue; I need the columns listed in a specific order on the card view.
Thanks!

posts.author: JAMatIHDA (Jeffery Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: Same issue here. I would really like to be able to arrange items on the card like I can with columns in the regular view.

posts.author: Hunter (Hunter Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml:
I found this question because I was facing the same issue. I believe I sorted out a fix.

If you rearrange the columns on your table view to be in the order you want them on the project pages tile widget, it should automatically update to reflect the new order.

“Round 1” is first on both the table & tile

Screenshot 2024-05-08 at 3.02.16 PM1010×234 12.5 KB


“Round 1” is now second on both from just dragging and dropping its column order with “Delivery Date”
Screenshot 2024-05-08 at 3.02.25 PM1052×312 16.1 KB

Edit: Upon rereading the OP’s first comment, it looks like they tried rearranging columns without luck. I will note that I did this under the “Main Table” view with success, but when I tried under “My Work View”, it did not work, despite “My Work” being the default table.

posts.author: DanCFT (Dan Woodford)
posts.cookedHtml: You need to re-order in the Main Table to achieve this
